name: Joshua Bitter
title: Principal Cloud & DevOps Professional
summary: Seasoned Principal Cloud & DevOps professional with over a decade of experience leading enterprise cloud transformation initiatives across Azure and AWS environments. Proven track record of architecting scalable multi-cloud solutions that improve operational efficiency, strengthen resiliency, and drive significant cost optimization. Experienced in designing cloud-native platforms, modernizing legacy infrastructure, automating enterprise deployments, and guiding organizations through large-scale modernization efforts. Adept at leading high-performing engineering teams and partnering with executive stakeholders to align technology strategy with business objectives.

highlights: Led Azure solution architecture for enterprise clients across healthcare, finance, and public sector verticals.
Designed and implemented Azure Landing Zones with integrated security baselines, identity management, and cost governance controls.
Automated CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps, increasing release velocity by 60% and reducing human error in deployments.
Delivered production-grade AKS clusters supporting 10,000+ end users with GitOps principles and hardened container security.
Guided clients through compliance audits including HIPAA, SOC 2, and ISO 27001.
Conducted Azure infrastructure audits that led to a 35% reduction in monthly spend through right-sizing, policy enforcement, and reservation strategies.
Designed high-availability hybrid architectures connecting on-premises data centers to Azure with ExpressRoute, Azure Arc, and site-to-site VPNs.
Built resilient big data pipelines and Hadoop environments for government clients.
Implemented private endpoints, NSGs, and Bastion hosts to align with zero-trust security models.
Managed full cloud onboarding lifecycle for 18+ SMB and mid-market clients migrating to Azure and Microsoft 365.
Automated infrastructure deployments with PowerShell and Azure CLI for virtual machines, networking, and identity services.
Supported remote workforce continuity during COVID-19 through Teams, Intune MDM, and Conditional Access policies.
Delivered IT assessments, licensing optimizations, and cost forecasting for client renewals.
Administered and supported hybrid infrastructure environments across Microsoft Azure and Microsoft 365 ecosystems.
Deployed and maintained VPNs, firewalls, Azure AD, Intune, and Exchange Online.
Automated recurring operational tasks using PowerShell and Azure CLI, reducing manual configuration time.
Resolved over 1,500 high-priority technical issues impacting global Azure infrastructure while maintaining SLAs in a 24/7 environment.
Automated VM provisioning workflows, reducing provisioning time by 70%.
Reduced Azure networking costs by 40% by identifying inefficient routing and data egress patterns.
Created knowledge base articles and automation scripts that cut average resolution time by 20%.
